response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform development; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute architecture, distributed systems, or leadership in cloud engineering teams.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse languages and domains
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to lead complex projects and build dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ exposure (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or large-scale distributed systems design
Lacks documented experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning ambiguous cloud projects
